examples: At checkout, your bill will be printed for you.
If a purchaser fails to punch in the correct PIN at the checkout, the transaction gets rejected.
Look at your checkout funnel, to see if there are any places where many new customers abandon their shopping cart.
Jeff Miller: The inspiration for Punchfork came from the foodie magazines at the grocery checkout line.
Double lattes, fresh flowers and checkout-aisle chewing gum are all perfectly harmless impulse buys.
